column1: The app crashes immediately every time I try to upload a file. This is urgent, my whole team is blocked and cannot access their work.
I was billed twice for my subscription this month and the second charge is incorrect. Please refund the duplicate payment.
My order shipped nine days ago but the tracking has not updated since. The package delivery seems to be delayed somewhere at the warehouse.
I would love a dark mode feature request in the next release. Thank you for the great work, the new dashboard is amazing.
Login is broken after the latest update, I get a 500 error and cannot access my account. Critical, our production system is down!
Quick question, how to change the billing email on my invoice receipt? Just wondering, no rush at all.
The sync freezes and times out whenever the server is under load, this has been a recurring problem for a week.
Wrong item delivered in my shipment, I need to arrange a return for the package.
